texto: You actually abolish slavery by accompanying the slave. We don't strategize our way out of slavery, we solidarize, if you will, our way toward its demise. We stand in solidarity with the slave, and by doing so, we diminish slavery's ability to stand.
explicacao: Citação de Gregory Boyle sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You actually abolish slavery by accompanying the slave. We don't strategize our way out of slaver…” articula reflexao, slavery, solidarity em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como solidarity.
